Introduction.en: Seashooters are amphibious and shoot in three directions while staying in water.
Introduction.zh: 海豌豆是两栖植物，在水中时可以向三个方向发射。

DESCRIPTION.zh: 在水中时发射海洋子弹

Chat.en: While helping her niece in school, Dave accidentally left Peashooters on a Lilypad near the school's pool. Four years later, Dave returned to his niece's graduation and found it had mutated into a totally different plant. "No beach pass? No entry!" says Seashooter while personally throwing zombies out of the water. "H2-OH-NO you don't!" exclaims Seashooter to the zombies entering the lawn or the pool on its watch.
Chat.zh: 有天戴夫帮侄女处理学校的事，不小心把一群豌豆射手落在学校泳池边的荷叶上。四年后，戴夫回来参加侄女的毕业典礼，发现他已经突变成完全不同的植物。“没海滩通行证？不许进！” 海豌豆一边说，一边把僵尸从水里轰出去。“别想沾上一滴水！” 海豌豆对着胆敢在他眼皮底下闯入草坪或泳池的僵尸厉声喝道。

BriefIntroduction.en: Amphibious plant that shoots 3 peas at the enemies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向僵尸发射 3 颗豌豆，两栖
